name: Potential Remote Desktop Connection to Non-Domain Host
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: James Pemberton
SIGMA Title: Potential Remote Desktop Connection to Non-Domain Host
SIGMA Description: Detects logons using NTLM to hosts that are potentially not part of the domain.

False positives:
- Host connections to valid domains, exclude these.
- Host connections not using host FQDN.
- Host connections to external legitimate domains.

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=8001 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%termsrv%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Potential Remote Desktop Connection to Non-Domain Host on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=8001 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%termsrv%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Potential Remote Desktop Connection to Non-Domain Host
